args.query:
SELECT o.OwnerId AS AgentId, SUM(oi.Quantity * oi.UnitPrice) AS SalesAmount
FROM "Order" o
JOIN OrderItem oi ON REPLACE(oi.OrderId,'#','') = REPLACE(o.Id,'#','')
WHERE DATE(o.EffectiveDate) >= DATE('2022-11-25','-5 months')
  AND DATE(o.EffectiveDate) <= DATE('2022-11-25')
GROUP BY o.OwnerId
ORDER BY SalesAmount DESC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT o.OwnerId AS AgentId, SUM(oi.Quantity * oi.UnitPrice) AS SalesAmount
FROM "Order" o
JOIN OrderItem oi ON REPLACE(oi.OrderId,'#','') = REPLACE(o.Id,'#','')
WHERE DATE(o.EffectiveDate) >= DATE('2022-11-25','-5 months')
  AND DATE(o.EffectiveDate) <= DATE('2022-11-25')
GROUP BY o.OwnerId
ORDER BY SalesAmount DESC
LIMIT 1;
